title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at More Retail Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at More Retail Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at More Retail Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About More Retail Holdings Services:
More Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Holdings Services!
